certificationTracks.title: Computer Ready
certificationTracks.description: You can use a computer independently. You know your way around the operating system, manage files and folders with confidence, handle hardware basics, and solve everyday problems without needing help.

certificationTracks.title: Digitally Connected
certificationTracks.description: You are at home on the internet. You browse with confidence, manage email professionally, store and share files in the cloud, and communicate safely across digital channels.

certificationTracks.title: Office Starter
certificationTracks.description: You produce professional documents and basic spreadsheets. Word lets you create formatted reports and letters; Excel handles your numbers with basic formulas. You are ready for the modern office.

certificationTracks.title: Office Proficient
certificationTracks.description: Microsoft Office is your toolkit. You write polished Word documents, build data-driven Excel spreadsheets with formulas, functions, and charts, and present ideas compellingly with PowerPoint. You work at a professional level.

certificationTracks.title: Data Entry Specialist
certificationTracks.description: Speed and accuracy are your strengths. You enter, clean, and manage data efficiently — keyboard shortcuts, Excel formulas, data validation, and consistent formatting standards — all without missing a beat.

certificationTracks.title: Digital Office Expert
certificationTracks.description: You are the complete digital office professional. Office tools, internet productivity, email management, digital communication, and data accuracy — you handle every computer task a modern workplace needs.

certificationTracks.title: Computer Applications Professional
certificationTracks.description: This is your DCA-equivalent credential. You have mastered everything a Computer Applications Professional needs — computer operations, office productivity, internet skills, and data management. You are ready for any office computing role.

certificationTracks.title: HTML Aware
certificationTracks.description: You know how the web is built. You write clean, structured HTML — semantic elements, forms, tables, images, links — and you understand why well-formed markup matters for browsers, search engines, and accessibility.

certificationTracks.title: CSS Aware
certificationTracks.description: You can style a web page. Selectors, the box model, colours, typography, and basic layout — you understand how CSS transforms plain HTML into something visual and presentable.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Starter
certificationTracks.description: You've written real JavaScript. Variables, functions, control flow, arrays, objects, and basic DOM manipulation — you can make a web page respond to user actions and think programmatically.

certificationTracks.title: Junior Web Programmer
certificationTracks.description: Your first complete web credential. You build structured pages with HTML, style them with CSS, and add logic and interactivity with JavaScript. You are ready to grow into a professional developer.

certificationTracks.title: Git Fluent
certificationTracks.description: You collaborate with Git the way professionals do. Branching, merging, resolving conflicts, working with remotes, and writing meaningful commit messages are second nature to you.

certificationTracks.title: HTML Aware
certificationTracks.description: You know how web content is structured. You write semantic, accessible HTML and understand how markup connects to CSS and JavaScript to form a complete web page.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Starter
certificationTracks.description: You think like a programmer. Variables, functions, loops, conditionals, and basic data structures in JavaScript — you write code that solves problems, not just code that runs.

certificationTracks.title: Tech Foundations
certificationTracks.description: You have the core toolkit every engineer starts with: professional version control, web structure, and programming logic. You are ready to specialise and grow into any software engineering path.

certificationTracks.title: Git Fluent
certificationTracks.description: Version control is non-negotiable in professional software engineering. You use Git fluently — branching strategies, rebasing, pull requests, and remote collaboration are all part of your workflow.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Programmer
certificationTracks.description: JavaScript is the lingua franca of modern software. You write clean, well-structured JavaScript — closures, async/await, array methods, modules — and you understand why the code behaves the way it does.

certificationTracks.title: Software Engineering Foundations
certificationTracks.description: You have the core competencies that all software engineers share — professional version control, programming fundamentals, and an understanding of how web systems are built. A solid base for any specialisation.

certificationTracks.title: HTML Developer
certificationTracks.description: You write production-quality HTML. Semantic structure, ARIA attributes, accessible forms, multimedia embedding, SEO-friendly markup — you know how to build web content that works for everyone.

certificationTracks.title: CSS Stylist
certificationTracks.description: You style pages like a professional. Flexbox, Grid, responsive design, media queries, custom properties, and scalable CSS architecture — you turn designs into living, breathing web experiences.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Programmer
certificationTracks.description: JavaScript is your tool for bringing web pages to life. You handle DOM manipulation, events, async data fetching, local storage, and ES6+ patterns with confidence.

certificationTracks.title: Certified Web Developer
certificationTracks.description: You are a web developer. You design page structure, apply professional CSS, and implement dynamic features with JavaScript. You build complete web experiences that are functional, styled, and interactive.

certificationTracks.title: HTML Intermediate
certificationTracks.description: Your HTML goes beyond the basics. You write semantic, accessible markup — ARIA roles, advanced form patterns, metadata, and the full HTML5 feature set — and you understand how it impacts SEO and assistive technology.

certificationTracks.title: CSS Intermediate
certificationTracks.description: You're past copy-paste CSS. Flexbox and Grid layouts, responsive breakpoints, CSS custom properties, animations, and scalable architecture patterns like BEM — you write CSS that is consistent, maintainable, and precise.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Programmer
certificationTracks.description: Interactive UIs are your domain. You write clean JavaScript — closures, event handling, async patterns, module imports, and robust DOM interaction — and you know how it all fits together in a browser environment.

certificationTracks.title: Expert UI Developer
certificationTracks.description: You build polished, complete user interfaces from scratch. Semantic HTML, precision CSS, and expressive JavaScript — working together. You think in components, care about accessibility, and deliver UIs that work for real users.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Programmer
certificationTracks.description: React is JavaScript — and you know JavaScript well. Closures, the event loop, promises, array methods, modules, and ES6+ syntax are all familiar. You are ready to move into React with a real foundation.

certificationTracks.title: React Starter
certificationTracks.description: You have built your first React applications. You understand the component model, JSX, props, state with useState, and side effects with useEffect. You can render lists, handle forms, and navigate between pages.

certificationTracks.title: React Developer
certificationTracks.description: React is your framework. You build full applications — custom hooks, context API, React Router, API integration with fetch or Axios, and controlled vs uncontrolled components. Your code is clean and predictable.

certificationTracks.title: React Expert
certificationTracks.description: You write production-grade React. Performance patterns (memo, useMemo, useCallback), global state with Redux or Zustand, code splitting, error boundaries, and testing with React Testing Library — you ship React apps that scale.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Programmer
certificationTracks.description: Angular is built on TypeScript and JavaScript — and you understand both. You write clean, modern JavaScript and you are comfortable with async programming, modules, and object-oriented patterns.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Programmer
certificationTracks.description: Node.js is JavaScript on the server — and your JavaScript is solid. Closures, async/await, Promises, modules, and the event-driven model are things you understand deeply, not just use.

certificationTracks.title: Node.js Developer
certificationTracks.description: You build server-side applications with Node.js. RESTful APIs, middleware patterns, error handling, async processing, npm package management, and connecting to databases — you write backends that work.

certificationTracks.title: Backend JavaScript Expert
certificationTracks.description: You are a Node.js professional. You design scalable APIs, handle authentication and security, understand the async model deeply, write structured TypeScript backends, and ship services that go to production.

certificationTracks.title: The Web Essentials
certificationTracks.description: You have the three pillars of the web working together. Clean HTML structure, styled with CSS, made interactive with JavaScript — you understand how they interconnect and can build real web pages from scratch.

certificationTracks.title: JavaScript Programmer
certificationTracks.description: JavaScript runs everywhere in full-stack development — in the browser and on the server. You write proficient, modern JavaScript and are ready to use it across the entire application stack.

certificationTracks.title: Full Stack JavaScript Developer
certificationTracks.description: You build complete web applications. Your JavaScript runs on both the browser and the server, you connect frontend to backend, handle data persistence, and understand the complete request-response lifecycle.

certificationTracks.title: Certified Full Stack Developer
certificationTracks.description: You are a certified full stack developer. From database schema design to RESTful APIs to polished frontends — you deliver complete, production-ready web applications and own the full engineering process.

certificationTracks.title: Java Programmer
certificationTracks.description: Java is your language. You write object-oriented programs, understand classes, interfaces, inheritance, generics, collections, and the Java standard library. You solve problems with Java the way it was designed to be used.

certificationTracks.title: Java Developer
certificationTracks.description: You are an intermediate Java developer. Exception handling, multithreading, file I/O, advanced OOP design patterns, JVM internals, and the broader Java ecosystem are part of your professional toolkit.

certificationTracks.title: Java Backend Developer
certificationTracks.description: You build enterprise-grade Java backends. Spring Boot, RESTful API design, Spring Data JPA for database access, Spring Security for authentication and authorisation — you write Java applications that are ready for production at scale.

certificationTracks.title: Spring Boot Developer
certificationTracks.description: Spring Boot is your framework. You bootstrap production-ready applications with auto-configuration, build RESTful APIs with Spring MVC, validate request data, handle exceptions globally, and wire services together with dependency injection.

certificationTracks.title: Spring Boot Professional
certificationTracks.description: You ship complete Spring Boot applications. Spring Data JPA, Spring Security with JWT, testing with JUnit 5 and MockMvc, microservice patterns, Kubernetes deployment, and production-ready features — you own the full backend lifecycle.

certificationTracks.title: Tailwind Aware
certificationTracks.description: You know Tailwind. You understand the utility-first approach, can set up a project, apply core layout and spacing utilities, and build responsive interfaces without writing a line of custom CSS.

certificationTracks.title: Tailwind UI Developer
certificationTracks.description: Tailwind is your styling system. You compose interactive, dark-mode-ready UIs with state variants, a consistent typography system, and reusable component patterns — all without leaving your markup.

certificationTracks.title: Tailwind Aware
certificationTracks.description: You can build websites with Tailwind CSS. The utility-first model, responsive prefixes, and core layout classes are second nature — you ship styled, responsive pages faster than with any traditional stylesheet.

certificationTracks.title: Tailwind UI Developer
certificationTracks.description: You build complete, polished web UIs with Tailwind. State-driven styles, dark mode, typography tuning, and @apply-based component extraction — you use Tailwind at a professional, production level.

certificationTracks.title: Tailwind Aware
certificationTracks.description: You pair Tailwind with React effectively. Utility classes in JSX, responsive component design, and dark mode toggling via class strategy — you style React applications the modern, productive way.

certificationTracks.title: Angular Beginner
certificationTracks.description: You build real Angular applications. Components, data binding, services, dependency injection, routing, forms, and HTTP — you understand the framework and can create functional apps from scratch.

certificationTracks.title: Angular Intermediate Developer
certificationTracks.description: You write production-quality Angular. Custom directives, advanced forms, lazy loading, content projection, animations, NgRx, and Angular Signals — you build scalable, well-structured Angular applications.

certificationTracks.title: Angular Pro Developer
certificationTracks.description: Angular is your expertise. SSR, performance optimisation, security, testing, dynamic components, PWA, i18n, CDK, and advanced RxJS — you architect Angular at enterprise scale.

certificationTracks.title: Tailwind Aware
certificationTracks.description: You integrate Tailwind CSS with Angular projects. You configure Tailwind alongside Angular's style encapsulation and build responsive, utility-driven Angular component templates.

certificationTracks.title: Tailwind Aware
certificationTracks.description: You use Tailwind across your full-stack projects. Fast, responsive, utility-first frontend styling is part of your complete application development workflow.

certificationTracks.title: Git Fluent
certificationTracks.description: Git is the gateway to DevOps. You use it like a professional — branching strategies, tagging releases, automation via hooks, resolving complex merge conflicts, and maintaining a clean, auditable repository history.

certificationTracks.title: Git Power User
certificationTracks.description: You push Git to its limits. Interactive rebasing, bisect, reflog, stash workflows, custom aliases, and repository automation — you are the person the team calls when Git gets complicated.

certificationTracks.title: DevOps Foundations
certificationTracks.description: You understand the engineering side of operations. From version control workflows and branching strategies to CI/CD pipeline concepts and infrastructure automation — you know how reliable software gets shipped.

certificationTracks.title: Cloud Foundations
certificationTracks.description: You understand cloud concepts without being tied to a single vendor. You can design provider-neutral infrastructure using service models, networking, storage, security, and operational best practices.

certificationTracks.title: Cloud Operations
certificationTracks.description: You can operate cloud systems reliably with CI/CD delivery, monitoring, cost control, and incident-aware practices that work across provider-agnostic environments.

certificationTracks.title: Cloud Infrastructure Specialist
certificationTracks.description: You design and manage production-grade cloud platforms, with container orchestration, infrastructure as code, and resilient operational workflows.
